prompt: A split view: on the left, a traditional metal filing cabinet with labeled drawers (Employees, Departments, Orders). On the right, the same structure shown as a simple database diagram with boxes and arrows. An equals sign connects them.
full_prompt: editorial illustration for a programming textbook. A split view: on the left, a traditional metal filing cabinet with labeled drawers (Employees, Departments, Orders). On the right, the same structure shown as a simple database diagram with boxes and arrows. An equals sign connects them. Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational. Simple and clear. White background. Minimal or no text in the image.
